business.name: Girls Go Golfing
business.hours: Open tee times weekly • Meet & Golf: 2nd Friday monthly

seo.description: Girls Go Golfing Utah is a safe, inclusive women's golf network founded by Jan Brownstein to fill open tee times, build confidence, and grow the game through community play, events, and podcast storytelling.

contact_form.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. We'll follow up soon with your best-fit group and upcoming tee times.
contact_form.error_message: We could not send your message right now. Please email us directly.

ui_labels.form_message_placeholder: Ask us a question or share your experience.

hero.headline: WE BELONG HERE
hero.subheadline: Founded in Utah to make golf more connected and less intimidating, Girls Go Golfing helps women meet, fill open tee times, and build real on-course confidence together.

about.title: What Is GGG?
about.content: After searching for a real network for women golfers in Utah and finding none, Jan Brownstein created Girls Go Golfing in November 2021. GGG is a safe, friendly, inclusive space where women can jump into open tee times, meet new groups, share photos from the course, and grow their game with positive reinforcement at every level.

founder_note.body: After looking for a real network for women in Utah who wanted to play golf together and not finding one, I built Girls Go Golfing Utah as a safe space for women to meet, fill open tee times, and get more women on the course. From experienced league players to women just starting out, this community is here to support your journey.
founder_note.quote: Playing golf as a woman with women is a completely different experience. Girls Go Golfing is here to prove: WE BELONG HERE.
founder_note.signature: Jan Brownstein, Creator of Girls Go Golfing
where_to_find: Facebook: Girls Go Golfing Utah (free community)
founder_note.podcast: Girls Go Golfing Podcast: discussions about golf for women by women.

services.title: What You’ll Find at GGG
services.intro: From beginner rounds to seasoned players, we focus on getting more women on the golf course, learning faster, and building long-term friendships through Utah golf.

items.name: Free Facebook Community
items.description: Join Girls Go Golfing Utah on Facebook to see posted tee times, available spots, and connect with women golfers across the state.

items.name: Open Tee Time Posts
items.description: We regularly post open tee times so you can jump into rounds, meet a new group, and play courses you know or want to try.

items.name: Meet & GOLF + Events
items.description: Join our monthly Meet & GOLF (2nd Friday), plus outings, tournaments, and community events throughout the year.

items.name: Instruction + Etiquette
items.description: Build confidence through PGA-led clinics, USGA rules guidance, and practical etiquette support for every skill level.

items.name: Podcast + Utah Golf Voices
items.description: Through the Girls Go Golfing Podcast, hear from women golfers, Utah golf pros, club leaders, and the stories behind the game.

testimonials.text: I moved to Salt Lake and found a group in one week. I went from playing alone to having a regular foursome.
testimonials.author: Megan T.

testimonials.text: As a true beginner, I was nervous at first. The group made me feel comfortable from day one, and now I actually look forward to tee times.
testimonials.author: Sofia L.

testimonials.text: The consistency is what changed everything for me. Weekly rounds and clinics helped my game and gave me an amazing circle of golf friends.
testimonials.author: Rachel B.

membership.title: Why Join Girls Go Golfing
membership.subtitle: Playing golf as a woman with women is a different experience. Join us to learn, connect, and experience Utah golf in a community that proves WE BELONG HERE.

benefits.title: Intimidation-Free Golf
benefits.description: We welcome every skill level and help take the intimidation out of golf so you can focus on enjoying the game.

benefits.title: Rules + Etiquette Confidence
benefits.description: Learn USGA rules, common etiquette, and practical on-course habits so you feel confident every round.

benefits.title: Real Connections + Utah Golf Access
benefits.description: Build authentic relationships while sharing course experiences, product feedback, and opportunities to play with women across Utah.

plans.name: Annual Membership
plans.description: The best value for committed members who want consistent play and access all year long.

plans.name: Monthly Membership
plans.description: A flexible option for members who want to join now and scale participation over time.

cta_section.title: Ready to Join the Movement?
cta_section.subtitle: Explore membership options, pick your plan, and come experience why women on the course together changes everything.
